cilantro_restaurant.title: Cilantro Restaurant
cilantro_restaurant.description: A popular dining spot near Ashapur Chauraha offering a diverse multi-cuisine menu with a comfortable, family-friendly seating environment.

restaurant_up_65.title: Restaurant UP-65
restaurant_up_65.description: A well-known local eatery on Rishpattan Road famous for serving flavorful North Indian dishes and casual bites in a lively neighborhood atmosphere.

red_palace_restaurant.title: Red Palace | family restaurant in varanasi
red_palace_restaurant.description: A spacious and elegantly designed family restaurant located at Haveliya Chauraha, perfect for large gatherings and enjoying authentic Indian cuisine.

the_friends_table.title: The Friends Table
the_friends_table.description: A cozy and modern cafe-style restaurant situated near the Sarnath Post Office, highly rated for its welcoming vibe, great hospitality, and delicious continental snacks.
